title: hypericum lalandii
intro: Hypericum lalandii, also known as Laland's St. John's Wort, is a species of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort genus, native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hypericum lalandii include its potential to reduce anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
